title: Outbound Outreach
shortSummary: Cold email, cold call, LinkedIn, and multi-channel sequences. Learn to break through the noise and earn the first conversation.
whyItMatters: Your prospects are drowning in outreach. The average decision-maker receives over 100 emails a day and ignores most cold calls. To stand out, you need to be relevant, concise, and persistent without being annoying. Great outbound is a craft — it combines research, copywriting, timing, and multi-channel coordination.
coreConcepts: Cold email: subject lines, personalisation, CTAs
Cold calling: openers, tone, handling gatekeepers
LinkedIn outreach: connection requests, InMails, engagement
Pattern interrupts, personalised first lines, and permission-based openers
Compliance: CAN-SPAM, Australian spam laws, GDPR basics
